VariableAccessorService.cc
1 #include "VariableAccessorService.h"
2 /* Author : desrozis at Wed Dec 17 15:34:42 2008
3  * Generated by createNew
4  */
5 
6 #include <arcane/IVariableMng.h>
7 
8 using namespace Arcane;
9 
10 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 
13 void
14 VariableAccessorService::init(const ItemGroup& group)
15 {
16  if (m_initialized)
17  return;
18 
19  // Manager de variables
20  IVariableMng * variable_mng = subDomain()->variableMng();
21 
22  // Nom de la variable
23  String variable_name = options()->name();
24 
25  // Recherche de la variable
26  m_ivariable = variable_mng->findMeshVariable(mesh(), variable_name);
27 
28  if (m_ivariable == NULL)
29  {
30  fatal() << "Variable '" << variable_name << "' not defined";
31  }
32 
33  // Verification du type de données => uniquement Real et Int32
34  if (m_ivariable->dataType() != DT_Real && m_ivariable->dataType() != DT_Int32)
35  {
36  fatal() << "Variable '" << variable_name
37  << "' data type not REAL or not Int32 (actually only used)";
38  }
39 
40  // Verification de la dimension => uniquement 1
41  if (m_ivariable->dimension() != 1)
42  {
43  fatal() << "Variable '" << variable_name
44  << "' dimension != 1 (actually only used)";
45  }
46 
47  m_initialized = true;
49  if (group.itemKind() != m_ivariable->itemKind())
50  {
51  fatal() << "Incompatible kind between " << m_ivariable->name()
52  << " variable and " << group.name() << " group";
53  }
54 }
55 
56 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
57 
58 IVariable *
59 VariableAccessorService::variable(const ItemGroup& group)
60 {
61  if (!m_initialized)
62  {
63  fatal() << "Service not initialized";
64  }
65 
66  // Check if variable is used, if not reconstruct it
67  if (!m_ivariable->isUsed())
68  {
69  m_ivariable->setUsed(true);
70  if (m_ivariable->computeFunction()) m_ivariable->computeFunction()->execute();
71  }// Warning variable stay in used state
72 
73  return m_ivariable;
74 }
75 
76 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
77 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
78 
79 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_VARIABLEACCESSOR(VariableAccessor,VariableAccessorService);
